subcodes.first_line: O my friends! In remembrance of the countenance and character of the beloved ones, the vision of the heart is illumined and the soul's essence is perfumed, for verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران من بیاد روی و خوی دوستان دیده دل منور است و دماغ جان معطر زیرا حقائق
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
